metadata.description: Native macOS control for Claude Desktop and Claude Code. 56 typed allow-listed MCP tools (windows, Finder, filesystem, system, input, app automation, terminal, iPhone Mirroring) plus 5 workflow skills. Code-signed Swift binary for stable TCC grants. Distributed as a one-click .mcpb.

plugins.name: mac-mcp
plugins.description: Native macOS control: 56 typed tools across windows, Finder, filesystem (allow-listed roots, symlink-safe), clipboard, screenshots, mouse/keyboard, app automation (Mail/Calendar/Messages/Safari/Notes), iTerm/Terminal, and iPhone Mirroring. Plus 5 workflow skills.
